instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all files are created as .js or .jsx, NOT .ts or .tsx.
Use Tailwind CSS for all styling.
Implement the landing page with pure HTML/Tailwind elements and deep Framer Motion animations for the 'creative agency' feel.
Implement the dashboard using Shadcn UI components but strip away the default 'Vercel' look by applying the custom palette.
Include data-testid attributes on ALL interactive elements and key informational elements. Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Implement the Kanban CRM pipeline using a drag-and-drop library like @hello-pangea/dnd or dnd-kit.
Use recharts for the dashboard data visualizations (embudo, líneas, barras).
For the gauge/radial chart in the diagnosis score, customize recharts or use a specialized component.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with Swiss Grid patterns.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Bento-style 'Control Room' grid. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.landing_grid: Tetris Grid. Asymmetrical layouts. Massive gaps (gap-16 to gap-32). Let elements breathe.
layout_and_spacing.containers: Always apply padding inside bordered containers (p-6 or p-8) to avoid text collision.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements, rounded-full for pills/badges. Subtly softer than strict brutalism.

components.buttons: Flat background, sharp text contrast. Subtle hover lift (-translate-y-0.5), transition-all duration-200. No massive shadows.
components.cards: 1px solid border (border-border), no default shadow. On hover, apply subtle shadow-md and slight border color darkening.
components.forms: Shadcn form components heavily customized to match the Swiss aesthetic. High contrast borders on focus (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary). Use rounded-lg for inputs.
components.kanban_board: Horizontal scrollable flex container. Columns are gray-tinted backgrounds (bg-gray-50 dark:bg-zinc-900) with 1px borders. Cards are white (or dark surface) with shadow-sm.
components.navigation: Glassmorphism for landing page sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 or bg-black/70). Solid clean sidebar for the Executive Dashboard.

motion.philosophy: Meaningful and performant. Focus on flow and data revelation.
motion.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up (y: 20 -> 0).
motion.hover_states: Quick (150ms) changes in border color and slight elevation.
motion.progress_bar: Smooth width transitions with Framer Motion for the multi-step diagnosis. Use a vibrant gradient (e.g., from primary to orange-400).

hero_background.description: Modern glass corporate building at dusk - use for landing page hero or background texture with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60) to let text pop.

dashboard_abstract.description: Abstract 3D geometric shapes - use as placeholder for AI Recommendation Engine visualizations or auth screen backgrounds.

team_collaboration.description: Business professionals meeting - use for 'Casos de Éxito', CRM module presentation, or the 'Agendar Reunión' section.
